commit.message:
Add structured task/sink descriptors for CLI visualization

- Add ITaskDescriptor and ISinkDescriptor interfaces in common
- Replace opaque Map<Integer, String> in DeviceData with typed TaskData/SinkData inner classes
- Register TaskData and SinkData with Fory
- Implement ITaskDescriptor on MeasurementTask/ChanneledMeasurementTask
- Implement ISinkDescriptor on all sink classes via IDataSink/AbstractDataSink/AbstractFilteredDataSink
- Update Device to implement getTaskDescriptors()/getSinkDescriptors()
- Rewrite CLI config mode with color-coded task->sink flow diagram
- Fix removeTask: delegate ITask overload to int overload (was not cancelling timer)
- Fix removeTask: remove cancelled timer from timers list (was leaking stale reference)
- Fix removeTask: drain matching pending requests from queue on task removal

commit.message:
feat: Phase 1 Rust workspace — 5 crates, MCP server, ProcessSandbox

Implements the complete Phase 1 backend:

Crates:
- sandcastle-runtime: SandboxRuntime trait, types (SandboxId, ExecRequest,
  ExecResult, SandboxConfig, ResourceLimits), error types with MCP error codes
- sandcastle-executor: In-sandbox binary, reads JSON from stdin, spawns
  language runtime (python3/node/bash), captures output with timeout/OOM
- sandcastle-manager: Session registry, file validation (allowed_input_dirs,
  path traversal), reaper for expired sessions, oneshot + session execution
- sandcastle-process: ProcessSandbox using libcontainer (youki), OCI spec
  generation via oci-spec crate, namespace isolation (pid/mount/ipc/uts/net),
  pipe-based executor communication, workspace bind-mounts
- sandcastle-server: MCP server using rmcp crate, 6 tools (execute_code,
  create_sandbox, execute_in_session, upload_file, download_file,
  destroy_sandbox), stdio transport, reaper background task

Tests:
- 15 unit tests (9 runtime types, 5 manager with mock runtime, 1 OCI spec)
- Integration test script: executor direct test, timeout handling, MCP server
  tool listing

Tooling:
- scripts/build-rootfs.sh: Docker export rootfs builder for python/bash/node

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sandcastle

Phase 14: Shimmer Animation (#33)

## Summary

**Phase 14: Shimmer Animation**
**Goal:** Users see a smooth animated skeleton shimmer while translation
is in progress, with no jarring layout shifts
**Status:** Verified ✓ (3/3 must-haves passed)

Adds a polished left-to-right gradient sweep shimmer animation to the
popup loading state. The shimmer plays from translation start until the
result appears, using `.plusLighter` blend mode that adapts to both
light and dark system appearance. Implemented as a zero-layout-impact
`.overlay` ViewModifier to avoid interfering with the popup's
GeometryReader height measurement. Fully respects the Reduce Motion
accessibility setting.

## Changes

### Plan 14-01: ShimmerModifier ViewModifier + Unit Tests
Left-to-right gradient sweep ViewModifier using `.plusLighter` blend
mode with Reduce Motion accessibility fallback.

**Key files created:**
- `Transy/Popup/ShimmerModifier.swift` — ViewModifier with animated
gradient sweep, `.clipped()`, `.allowsHitTesting(false)`
- `TransyTests/ShimmerModifierTests.swift` — 3 structural tests

### Plan 14-02: Wire Shimmer into LoadingPopupText
Connected `ShimmerModifier` to the actual loading UI via `.shimmer()` on
`PopupText` inside `LoadingPopupText.body`.

**Key files modified:**
- `Transy/Popup/PopupView.swift` — Added `.shimmer()` call on
loading-state text

## Requirements Addressed

| ID | Requirement | Status |
|----|------------|--------|
| SHM-01 | Shimmer animation plays on popup text during translation
loading | ✓ |
| SHM-02 | Zero layout impact — no resize notification storm | ✓ |
| SHM-03 | Reduce Motion disables animation — static muted text fallback
| ✓ |

## Verification

- [x] Automated verification: PASSED (3/3 must-haves)
- [x] Human visual verification: gradient sweep, no layout shift, Reduce
Motion compliance
- [x] Unit tests: all pass (`make test`)

## Key Decisions

- `.overlay` architecture (not ZStack) to prevent GeometryReader height
measurement interference
- `.plusLighter` blend mode for light/dark adaptive shimmer appearance
- 1.5s linear `repeatForever(autoreverses: false)` sweep speed
- `.onAppear` for animation start (not `.task`) per pitfall analysis

Closes #28

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: replace agent-framework metapackage with agent-framework-core

The agent-framework metapackage pulls agent-framework-core[all], which
installs 25+ unused provider packages (pythonnet, boto3, anthropic,
claude-sdk, etc). These cause intermittent ImportError on CI due to
namespace package conflicts in the agent_framework namespace.

Replace with agent-framework-core directly — we only need core, foundry,
openai, and ollama providers. Reduces dependencies from 167 to 81 packages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix(omada): Use deauth endpoint for revocation

The Omada controller does not have an extPortal/revoke
endpoint.  Per TP-Link FAQ 3231 the correct path for
client deauthorization is extPortal/deauth.  The old
path returned error -1600 Unsupported request path.

commit.message:
fix(macos): fix clipboard copy failing from tray and GUI (#4629)

The clipboard copy from tray menu and capture GUI was broken on macOS:

1. FlameshotDaemon::copyToClipboard() created a KDSingleApplication
   instance and called isPrimaryInstance(), which always returned false
   (the daemon already holds the socket). This caused a 3-second IPC
   timeout before falling back. Fix: use instance() to check if the
   daemon singleton exists in-process, matching non-macOS behavior.

2. saveToClipboardMime() used setData("image/...") which puts a lazy
   reference on the macOS pasteboard. If the app exits before paste,
   data is lost ("Cannot keep promise"). Fix: use setImageData() for
   native pasteboard persistence, plus setData() for exact format.

3. saveJpegToClipboardMacOS() used osascript with a temp file and
   incorrectly labeled JPEG data as PNG UTI. Removed entirely — the
   fixed saveToClipboardMime() now handles both JPEG and PNG.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: 新增设备控制命令 device reboot/boot 及硬件环境文档

新增功能：
- luatos-flash/src/device.rs：device_reboot / device_enter_boot 公共接口，
  覆盖 bk72xx / xt804 / ec718 / ccm4211 四大芯片系列及通用 DTR 方式
- luatos-cli/src/cmd_device.rs：CLI 命令处理层，支持 text/JSON 双输出格式
- main.rs：新增 device 子命令（device reboot / device boot），
  参数：--port（可选，EC718 自动检测）、--chip（可选，省略用通用 DTR）

新增文档：
- docs/dev-hardware-env.md：硬件测试环境搭建指南，涵盖驱动安装、
  DTR/RTS 接线规范、各芯片手工进入 boot 模式方法及常见问题排查

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Swipe-Right Entnehmen auch bei Menge = 1 ermöglichen

- quantity > 1 Einschränkung in ItemRow entfernt
- RemoveQuantitySheet zeigt bei Menge=1 vereinfachte Ansicht ohne Stepper
- Direkt 'Entnehmen & löschen' mit Bestätigungsdialog

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove redundant spaCy download step from deploy workflow

The spaCy model wheel URLs are already in requirements.txt, so
pip install -r requirements.txt --target ... installs them.
The separate python -m spacy download step fails because spaCy
isn't on the system Python path (it's in .python_packages/).

Also granted Storage Blob Data Contributor to the service principal
for blob uploads.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Keep notification visible after action; disable buttons until backend responds

Instead of instantly removing the card when an action button is pressed,
the buttons are disabled immediately (preventing double-press) and the card
stays in the DOM. Removal is now driven entirely by a backend SSE delete event
(animated) or a re-render on SSE action event. Buttons are only re-enabled
if the POST itself fails.

fix: use Python 3.13 in CI to fix agent-framework import error

agent-framework-core[all] installs pythonnet/powerfx which require
.NET runtime. On Python 3.12 + Ubuntu CI without .NET, these cause
cascading import failures in the agent_framework namespace package.

commit.message: Polish homepage hero styling and animation\n\nCo-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

contracts: fix §1 estimate ref, new §2 penalty clauses, configurable penalty UI

- §1: uses estimate number (Kosztorysem nr WY-XXX) instead of address/name
- §2: replaced old single-clause with 4-point structure per user's legal text:
  - point 2: max 30-day extension for unforeseen circumstances
  - point 3: automatic extension for investor-caused delays
  - point 4: penalty only after extended deadline, with configurable rate
- ContractForm: new 'Kary umowne' section with per-day % and max % inputs
  - live preview of penalty clause text before saving
  - defaults: 0.1% per day, max 10%
- model.ts: added penalty_per_day_pct and max_penalty_pct optional fields

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
